data.title: Toyota GR Corolla v Honda Civic Type R DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: toyota gr corolla v honda civic type r drag race _ transcript what will win in a drag race between a civic type r and a toyota gr corolla? well, we ' re going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m m watson and you ' re watching car wag. the honda civic type r has a 2 l turbocharged 4 - cylinder petrol engine with 329 horsepower and 420 new m of torque. power is sent to the front wheels only via six - speed manual gearbox. the car weighs 1, 429 kg and it costs from £52, 000. the toyota gr corolla has a 1.6 l turbocharged 3 - cylinder petrol engine with 304 horsepower and 370 new m of torque. it drives all four wheels via a six - speed manual gearbox. the car weighs in at 1, 475 kg and this imported model is for sale at whiff bits in wales for £45, 000. first thing we ' re going to do is the customary carwow sound check. so, i ' m going to rev up my car. so, rory, put your window down a little bit and have a listen to this clutch in [ music ] soft limiter at 3 and a half. okay. um, your turn. and i hope your car sounds better than the exhaust look. [ music ] it does sound okay. plenty of turbo whoo, which is nice. definite win for you. you got a higher bloom in soft limiter than me. i mean, both these cars have three exhaust pipes, but i don ' t know what to do with theirs. it ' s like they just we can ' t we got three exhaust pipes, but we can ' t possibly copy honda, so let ' s just make them look stupid. it is as though someone just fitted the middle one, but didn ' t talk to the people that put the ones on the outside there. it ' s like no one spoke to each other. it looks really, really weird. it ' s really weird when you consider the ones on the gis look great. it ' s like they were stuck with what to do, right? what do you think ' s going to happen? you got more weight, more traction, less power, less torque. i mean, i think it ' s going to be a lot down to the uh gear changes and obviously i am not a pro, but i feel like my
